_comment: RecommendationRun forward pipeline. Realized as a pure transition function in pf.domain; the run loop runs in pf.app. Single writer: the one process that started the run drives it to a terminal state, so no optimistic-lock overlay is needed on the run itself. The flaky dependency is the market-data provider, handled by the collectRetry overlay (bounded retry of the fetch) and, at the feed layer, the MarketDataFeed circuit breaker.

_delays.FETCH_TIMEOUT: 20000 ms - collecting price history for the whole candidate universe
_delays.RETRY_BACKOFF: ~1000 ms exponential backoff between price-fetch retries
